title: Indentation not shown in activities
excerpt: In Sales CRM activities log, I can use several indentation levels. However, once saved, the indentation is not properly shown in the update/note history. It is then just showing all notes in bulleted list with the same l…

posts.author: Jannik (Oberlies)
posts.cookedHtml:
In Sales CRM activities log, I can use several indentation levels. However, once saved, the indentation is not properly shown in the update/note history. It is then just showing all notes in bulleted list with the same level of indentation.
I use Google Chrome in Version 131.0.6778.205

Hope you can fix this. Thanks
